matched_step_ratio.estimator: log_point_bootstrap (diagnostic-grade; the decision-grade interval is the episode-cluster bootstrap on held-out windows)

reference_reached_at.smoothing: first step from which 3 CONSECUTIVE logged rows are all <= target; corroborated by the first 1000-step bucket whose MEAN is <= target. NOT a rolling median and NOT a single row -- this metric is per-batch and swings ~2x between adjacent rows, so any single-row rule reads ~5x too early (see docstring).
reference_reached_at.estimator: first step from which 3 CONSECUTIVE logged rows are all <= target; corroborated by the first 1000-step bucket whose MEAN is <= target. NOT a rolling median and NOT a single row -- this metric is per-batch and swings ~2x between adjacent rows, so any single-row rule reads ~5x too early (see docstring).

budget_normalization.note: equal-step is NOT equal-cost; the run with the smaller s/step gets more steps per GPU-hour

reason: a pre-registered secondary gate was not measured
